message:
🐛 Remove nightly_e2e_status from DEMO_DATA_CARDS — card uses live data (#1144)

The card dynamically reports isDemoData via useNightlyE2EData hook. Adding
it to DEMO_DATA_CARDS (in PR #1143) forced isDemoData prop=true which
overrode the hook's report, causing:
- Demo badge + yellow outline even with live data
- Perceived cache miss (cached data showed with demo badge)
- Badge persisting on navigate-back despite shared CacheStore

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
